android_role: • Dev lead for Jetpack Compose Kotlin and Java app with 17,000 monthly users
android_about: • App allows internal users to submit forms, use the native device camera to scan VINs, take photos of vehicles, and receive push notifications about their submissions
android_work_collab: • Collaborated with a team of developers, QA and UAT testers, product owners, and UI/UX to design, size, and develop new features
android_incidents: • Managed production incidents and communicated with end users to resolve individual issues
android_msauth: • Implemented Microsoft Authentication to comply with new security requirements
android_analytics: • Implemented Adobe Analytics reporting suite and sent out monthly analytics reports to leadership
react_role: • Frontend developer for Nextjs microfrontend rewrite of legacy application
react_about: • Application allows internal users to create and modify projects for returning parts and to view tabulated summaries of existing projects
react_work_screens: • Created reusable React components as well as screens based on Figma mockups
react_work_api: • Implemented mock Redux RTK Query API for future integration stories
name: Ilya Belegradek
about-me: Hello! I'm a software developer with {numYears} years experience developing Android and React applications. I enjoy the process of iterating on projects and watching them grow before my eyes. In my spare time, I like to play video games, play and watch soccer, and watch TV. Feel free to reach out if you'd like to get in touch!
